You are Player 0 in SimpleTak.
On the board, your stones appear as 'O' and your opponent's stones appear as 'X'.

On your turn, choose one empty cell (by its numbered index) and place your stone there.
For example, '[12]' places your stone in cell 12.

Your objective is to form a continuous path of your stones that connects two opposite edges of the board (top-to-bottom or left-to-right). If you do this, you win immediately.
